type_error_policy: Pycairo runtime TypeError and AttributeError assertions map to MoonBit compile-time rejection. TextCluster is a closed typed value with two required Int fields; tuple subclassing maps to fields, components, checked indexing, value equality, and hashing. Python repr/eval behavior maps to derived structural Debug and typed construction, while Int enforces the signed 32-bit Cairo field range.

static_api: pub fn TextCluster::at(Self, Int) -> Int raise CairoError
test_type.adaptation: TextCluster is a closed MoonBit struct rather than a Python tuple subclass. Fields, components, equality, hashing, and checked index syntax preserve the useful value protocol.

test_text_cluster_limits.adaptation: MoonBit Int matches Cairo's signed 32-bit int, so values outside the upstream bounds are rejected before a TextCluster or RectangleInt can be constructed.
